tasks.title: Create Dedicated AI Mailboxes for Sequence Engine
tasks.notes: Mike creating new mailboxes for AI to send 13-step sequence emails directly. Once live: fully automated outreach — research, draft, send, track replies, advance steps. Key unlock for scaling to 40+ leads/day per rep.

tasks.title: Build Sequence Engine (sequences.json + processor)
tasks.notes: Replace per-lead crons with single database + 1 daily processor cron. Needed for scale. Blocked by: mailbox setup.

tasks.title: Build AI Chatbot for rylem.com (Replace Calendly)
tasks.notes: Replace 5 Calendly buttons with AI chatbot. Qualifies prospects, captures contact info, routes hot leads to Mike via Telegram. Custom build, no SaaS.

tasks.title: LinkedIn Connection Requests — All 25+ Leads
tasks.notes: Send connection requests to all Batch 1, Batch 3, and sequence engine leads. Limit: 15/day. Spread over 2 days (Mon-Tue) if needed.
